_meta.purpose: Marketing build queue: keyword targets to BUILD or REFRESH, with competitor (SurveyHero) gap intel. Read by the next-page / landing-page skills when you say 'build' or 'next page'. NOT read by Jigsaw at build time (config.php only loads template-overrides.json + api/* from this dir), and the _data dir is not published to the live site.
_meta.source: Survey-cluster SERP gap analysis vs SurveyHero, imported 2026-06-06.

schema.youform_position: current rank, or null = not ranking yet
schema.surveyhero_position: where SurveyHero ranks for the same term (the gap we're closing)
schema.action: build = net-new page | refresh = improve an existing page | fold = merge into a cluster page
schema.target_exists: true if target_page already has a source/ file

_meta.excluded: Striking-distance rows 'survey builder' (#2, pos 23) and 'create online survey' (#3, pos 37) are NOT here — both target /online-survey-builder/ and are already tracked live in .claude/skills/striking-distance/ledger.json. Do not duplicate them; the striking-distance skill regenerates them from live GSC data.

clusters.pending: User must drop 5 review screenshots into source/assets/images/ (see filenames in research brief). Then review + deploy. Research: source/_data/qualtrics-alternative-research.md
clusters.note: HIGHEST-INTENT WINNABLE GAP. We have Typeform/Jotform/SurveyMonkey/Tally/Fillout/Google-Forms alternative pages but NOT Qualtrics (the enterprise survey leader). Commercial intent, $16 CPC = enterprise buyers. Low volume but high value/conversion. Use the existing competitor-alternative template (source/typeform-alternative.blade.php pattern). Note 'surveyhero alternative' has ~0 volume — do NOT build that.
Extend the existing QR free-tool to capture 'qr code survey', or spin a dedicated /qr-code-survey/ if the QR page stays Google-Forms-scoped.

Page shipped 2026-06-04 (commit c8173ea90) — TOO NEW to refresh. Let it mature ~28d before judging whether the sibling terms need folding in. Do not surface as a build/refresh candidate before refresh_not_before.

keywords.keyword: how to create an anonymous survey

clusters.note: Net-new examples gallery. ANCHOR ON 'survey examples' (parent_topic, vol 2100, KD 2, TP 6800) — NOT 'sample survey'. Live Ahrefs check showed 'sample survey' is survey-SAMPLING/stats intent (parent_topic 'what is the sample of a survey', TP only 50), the wrong audience for a gallery. Keep 'sample survey' out of H1/title; at most a small 'survey sample size' aside. Fold in website/online/template example terms.

keywords.parent_topic: what is the sample of a survey

clusters.note: Template pages are API/JSON-owned (Jigsaw collection). Do NOT hand-author Blade pages — add the page + SEO via source/_data/template-overrides.json (see [[sd-template-pages-api-owned]]). Each keyword maps to its own template slug below.

Net-new commercial listicle. 'free survey platforms' folds in. HARD: live check shows parent_topic 'survey monkey'/'qualtrics survey' — SERP is dominated by big-brand listicles. Long ranking horizon; only build if committing to ongoing link-building.

Add commercial-modifier terms to the existing builder page. Beware: this page is ALSO a live striking-distance experiment target for 'survey builder' / 'create online survey' — coordinate edits with the ledger so you don't clobber an in-flight test.
CSV said 'fold into use-case page' but /email-survey/ does not exist yet — so this is a net-new use-case page.
